_logger.LogError(
    exception,
    "DIA file missing after 7 AM NZT. FailureType: {FailureType}, NzNow: {NzNow}",
    "MissingDiaFileAfter7AmNzt",
    nzNow);


_logger.LogError(
    exception,
    "Multiple valid DIA files found for today. Aborting processing. FailureType: {FailureType}, Files: {Files}",
    "MultipleValidDiaFiles",
    fileList);
